# Pawn Island Records

Official site: https://pawnislandrecords.com/
Founder and writer: Matthew H. Freeman
Also referenced as: Matthew Freeman, Matt Freeman
Description: Pawn Island Records is an independent label and multi-project release world for music written and built by Matthew H. Freeman.
Contact: pawnisland@outlook.com

Canonical public pages:
- Home: https://pawnislandrecords.com/
- About: https://pawnislandrecords.com/about.html
- Roster: https://pawnislandrecords.com/roster.html
- Artists: https://pawnislandrecords.com/artists/
- Releases: https://pawnislandrecords.com/releases/
- Connect: https://pawnislandrecords.com/connect.html

Official project pages:
- Rhea Mauro: https://pawnislandrecords.com/artists/rhea-mauro/ - Soulful belting / adult contemporary / country
- High Ground: https://pawnislandrecords.com/artists/high-ground/ - Urban hip hop / New England identity
- Velvet Orchard: https://pawnislandrecords.com/artists/velvet-orchard/ - Bass-forward EDM / dance pop
- Quiet Filter: https://pawnislandrecords.com/artists/quiet-filter/ - Stoner doom / heavy ritual
- Resunant: https://pawnislandrecords.com/artists/resunant/ - Alternative rock / glam rock
- Matt Freeman: https://pawnislandrecords.com/artists/matt-freeman/ - Pop culture / uncategorized songs
- Blackout State: https://pawnislandrecords.com/artists/blackout-state/ - Pop punk / shutdown energy
- Crick Kinnard: https://pawnislandrecords.com/artists/crick-kinnard/ - Bluesy southern country / soul
- second watch: https://pawnislandrecords.com/artists/second-watch/ - Contemporary gospel / modern church music

Official release pages:
- Hearthblood: https://pawnislandrecords.com/releases/rhea-mauro-hearthblood/
- Aura Farming: https://pawnislandrecords.com/releases/rhea-mauro-aura-farming/
- Save a Horse Buy a Jet: https://pawnislandrecords.com/releases/rhea-mauro-save-a-horse-buy-a-jet/
- The View From Up Here: https://pawnislandrecords.com/releases/high-ground-the-view-from-up-here/

- Afterglow: https://pawnislandrecords.com/releases/velvet-orchard-afterglow/

- Hold My Hand: https://pawnislandrecords.com/releases/velvet-orchard-hold-my-hand/
- Lights On: https://pawnislandrecords.com/releases/velvet-orchard-lights-on/
- Like Magic: https://pawnislandrecords.com/releases/velvet-orchard-like-magic/
- Ripe with Mercy: https://pawnislandrecords.com/releases/velvet-orchard-ripe-with-mercy/
- Semantic Mirage: https://pawnislandrecords.com/releases/velvet-orchard-semantic-mirage/
- Carry the Quiet: https://pawnislandrecords.com/releases/velvet-orchard-carry-the-quiet/
- Taking Shape: https://pawnislandrecords.com/releases/velvet-orchard-taking-shape/
- Exposure Therapy: https://pawnislandrecords.com/releases/velvet-orchard-exposure-therapy/
- Through the Wall: https://pawnislandrecords.com/releases/quiet-filter-through-the-wall/
- Ash as Evidence: https://pawnislandrecords.com/releases/resunant-ash-as-evidence/
- Midnight Revival: https://pawnislandrecords.com/releases/resunant-midnight-revival/
- Time Out (Zack Morris is Trash!): https://pawnislandrecords.com/releases/matt-freeman-time-out-zack-morris-is-trash/
- No Manual, No Master: https://pawnislandrecords.com/releases/blackout-state-no-manual-no-master/
- High Time: https://pawnislandrecords.com/releases/blackout-state-high-time/
- Red River: https://pawnislandrecords.com/releases/crick-kinnard-red-river/
- That's Fair: https://pawnislandrecords.com/releases/crick-kinnard-thats-fair/
- Send Me: https://pawnislandrecords.com/releases/crick-kinnard-send-me/
- Empty Chambers: https://pawnislandrecords.com/releases/crick-kinnard-empty-chambers/
- Psalm of Myself: https://pawnislandrecords.com/releases/second-watch-psalm-of-myself/
